title: Elegant Clear Glass Tea Light Holder (110g) 1 Pack - Sleek Round Design & Dazzling Centerpiece - Perfect For Weddings, Home Decor & Gift
features: ELEGANT CLEAR GLASS DESIGN: Our beautifully crafted tea light holders are made from high-quality clear glass, giving them a sleek and sophisticated appearance that effortlessly enhances any decor.

SLEEK ROUND SHAPE: These candle holders boast a unique round design that not only adds to their visual appeal but also ensures stability and prevents toppling, making them perfect for any surface in your home or event venue.

VERSATILE DECORATIVE PIECE: Ideal for weddings, dinner parties, and other events, these versatile tea light holders can also be used to create a warm and inviting ambiance your home or as a thoughtful gift for friends and family.
SET OF 6 ASSORTED HOLDERS: Each pack includes six assorted clear glass tea light holders, allowing you to mix and match and create the perfect tabletop or mantle display.

PERFECT FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: Whether you're looking for charming wedding centerpieces, stylish home accents, or unique gift ideas, our elegant clear glass tea light holders are sure to impress with their dazzling presence and timeless appeal.
description: Elevate your decor with the elegant clear glass tea light holder.  Weighing a mere 110g, this holder is as practical as it is beautiful. Its sleek round design harmoniously blends with any setting, becoming a dazzling centerpiece that effortlessly captures attention. Ideal for both intimate and grand settings, it's a perfect addition to weddings. When used in home decor, it brings a touch of elegance and warmth. Beyond its use, this tea light holder makes a thoughtful gift, conveying your exquisite taste to the recipient. Treat yourself or a loved one to this radiant piece, and let its light transform your space into a serene sanctuary.
